name: WebSearch

query.description: The search query to be executed

num.description: Maximum number of search results to return (default: 5)

lr.description: Language restriction for search results (e.g., 'lang_en' for English)

description: This tool can be used to search the internet. Should be used with caution as frequent searches result in a bad user experience and excessive costs.
description_zh: 此工具可用于搜索互联网。应谨慎使用，因为频繁搜索会导致糟糕的用户体验和过高的成本。
examples: Search for latest docs: query="latest documentation 2025"
Search with language: query="Python tutorial", lr="lang_en"
examples_zh: 搜索最新文档: query="最新文档 2025"
带语言限制搜索: query="Python教程", lr="lang_zh"
